Just now

The Threshold Prompt System for Creating Portals, Windows and Narrative Depth in Midjourney
Some images show us a beautiful world, others make us pause at its entrance.
A door remains half open.
Leaves conceal the end of a path.
A curtain lifts just enough to reveal an unfamiliar light.
We are no longer looking at a picture.
We are standing before a decision.
Do we remain where we are?
Or do we enter?
This small hesitation changes everything. The image is no longer a surface filled with beautiful objects. It becomes a passage between the space we occupy and a world we can almost reach.
In visual storytelling, the most compelling place is not always the world itself, sometimes, it is the threshold before it.
A Frame Shows. A Threshold Invites.
Frames and thresholds may look similar.
Both can be created with doors, windows, arches, branches, curtains or architectural openings. Both can guide the eye toward an important area of the image.
But they do not perform the same visual function.
